codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review confirmed the SPLIT/HYBRID follow-up solved the specific replay-compatibility concern without reopening broader payment-mode behavior: the diff is limited to `SalesOrderRequest`, `SalesCoreEngine`, and focused request/service tests that preserve canonical normalization for fresh requests while keeping legacy SPLIT retries hash-compatible. No widened mode acceptance or duplicate-order regression was evident in the reviewed diff, so the feature passes on reachable commit `6870bc6ca50924f5df13d67d90a0464e8a59a60d` (`fix(o2c): preserve legacy split idempotency replay`).

summary: Pass. Legacy SPLIT replay compatibility remains safely constrained on commit `6870bc6ca50924f5df13d67d90a0464e8a59a60d`, with targeted request/service coverage and no scope creep.
